What a great illustration of the central problem of AI benchmarking for real work

All of the effort is going into benchmarking for coding, but that is a small part of the actual jobs people do, which leaves the true trajectory of AI progress less clear. https://t.co/6BXHdPFLkx https://t.co/X5w6jaBR1Z

OpenAI 发布了 GPT-5.3 Instant，替换 ChatGPT 中使用最广的日常对话模型 GPT-5.2 Instant。

核心改进有三块：

1. 第一是减少“说教感”

之前的模型经常在回答前加一大段“我能帮什么、不能帮什么”的免责声明，或者对正常问题过度拒绝。新版本会直接回答问题，不再绕弯子。OpenAI
